body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
- Add debugging diagnostics for runoff (can remove some of them in the future if we no longer need them)
- plot total water volume per area over time. Next time we run for 20 years, we can assess if the model is spun up
- fix units of runoff in ILAMB conversion 


Also:
- Fix plot name bug (pdf -> png)

title: Runoff debugging tools
